mapper.select:
SELECT u.uuid AS uid, u.username AS username, u.nickname AS nickname, u.avatar AS avatar, u.title_name AS titleName, u.title_color AS titleColor, u.signature AS signature, r.rating AS rating, r.contest_count AS count FROM user_contest_rating r INNER JOIN user_info u ON u.uuid = r.uid
(u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchUser}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchUser}, '%'))
ORDER BY r.rating DESC, r.contest_count DESC, u.username ASC
